title: The Seaward Artillery Practice Act, 1949
full_text: The Seaward Artillery Practice Act, 1949 सागर-दिशा तोप अभ्‍यास अधिनियम,1949 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194908 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 1949-02-17 Act Year: 1949 Short Title: The Seaward Artillery Practice Act, 1949 Hindi Title: सागर-दिशा तोप अभ्‍यास अधिनियम,1949 Long Title: An Act to provide facilities for carrying out seaward artillery practice. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 17-02-1949 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Seaward Artillery Practice Act, 1949 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and application. Section 2. Interpretation. Section 3. Power of Central Government to authorise seaward artillery practice. Section 3A. Power to delegate. Section 4. Powers exercisable for purposes of seaward artillery practice. Section 5. Compensation. Section 6. Method of assessing compensation. Section 7. Offences. Section 8. Protection of action taken under this Act. Section 9. Power to make rules.
